records.m_Talk_ENG: What is going on...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is going on...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is going on...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, is that how you're going to come out? We're the infamous Phantom Thief J.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, is that how you're going to come out? We're the infamous Phantom Thief J.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, is that how you're going to come out? We're the infamous Phantom Thief J.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-there are two... Phantom Thief Js?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-there are two... Phantom Thief Js?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-there are two... Phantom Thief Js?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Phantom Thief Jane.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Phantom Thief Jane.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Phantom Thief Jane.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I'm Phantom Thief Joo Shiyoung!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I'm Phantom Thief Joo Shiyoung!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I'm Phantom Thief Joo Shiyoung!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We just use Phantom Thief J in short. You're a detective, so you get it right away, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We just use Phantom Thief J in short. You're a detective, so you get it right away, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We just use Phantom Thief J in short. You're a detective, so you get it right away, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heh, it really was lame that she didn't notice it when we were robbing that square's safe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heh, it really was lame that she didn't notice it when we were robbing that square's safe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heh, it really was lame that she didn't notice it when we were robbing that square's safe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's get the painting and get out of here. We might fall for another trap if we get careless.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's get the painting and get out of here. We might fall for another trap if we get careless.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's get the painting and get out of here. We might fall for another trap if we get careless.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, yeah. I'm coming!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, yeah. I'm coming!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, yeah. I'm coming!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... I didn't expect for it to be real. I thought the painting was certainly a counterfeit...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... I didn't expect for it to be real. I thought the painting was certainly a counterfeit...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... I didn't expect for it to be real. I thought the painting was certainly a counterfeit...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, it's real. Nothing fake can ever exist in my house!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, it's real. Nothing fake can ever exist in my house!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, it's real. Nothing fake can ever exist in my house!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, I can't believe she just blasted the painting into bits...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, I can't believe she just blasted the painting into bits...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, I can't believe she just blasted the painting into bits...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was something I cherished, but it's better to destroy it than to hand it over to you thieves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was something I cherished, but it's better to destroy it than to hand it over to you thieves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was something I cherished, but it's better to destroy it than to hand it over to you thieves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I'll probably get scolded by my dad again. Hahaha!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I'll probably get scolded by my dad again. Hahaha!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I'll probably get scolded by my dad again. Hahaha!

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-Miss Lin!
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-Miss Lin!
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-Miss Lin!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You two, hold still. I'll get you two out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You two, hold still. I'll get you two out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You two, hold still. I'll get you two out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whew... Thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whew... Thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whew... Thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... I don't like where this is headed. Shall we make a run for it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... I don't like where this is headed. Shall we make a run for it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... I don't like where this is headed. Shall we make a run for it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where do you think you're going? Don't you know the squeaky wheel gets the grease?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where do you think you're going? Don't you know the squeaky wheel gets the grease?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where do you think you're going? Don't you know the squeaky wheel gets the grease?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, you thieves... you'll have to pay for breaking into my house.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, you thieves... you'll have to pay for breaking into my house.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, you thieves... you'll have to pay for breaking into my house.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... I hate it when things turn out like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... I hate it when things turn out like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... I hate it when things turn out like this.
